# Bangladesh Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Bangladesh's administrative hierarchy:
> 8 divisions, 64 districts, 495 upazilas.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total divisions: 8
- Total districts: 64
- Total upazilas: 495
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All divisions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-division.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All upazilas (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-upazila.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Division

- [Barishal](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/barishal-bd10/) — 6 districts, 42 upazilas
- [Chattogram](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/chattogram-bd20/) — 11 districts, 104 upazilas
- [Dhaka](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/dhaka-bd30/) — 13 districts, 89 upazilas
- [Khulna](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/khulna-bd40/) — 10 districts, 59 upazilas
- [Mymensingh](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mymensingh-bd45/) — 4 districts, 35 upazilas
- [Rajshahi](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rajshahi-bd50/) — 8 districts, 67 upazilas
- [Rangpur](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/rangpur-bd55/) — 8 districts, 58 upazilas
- [Sylhet](https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sylhet-bd60/) — 4 districts, 41 upazilas

## Per-Division Full Data

- [Barishal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/barishal-bd10.txt)
- [Chattogram](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/chattogram-bd20.txt)
- [Dhaka](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/dhaka-bd30.txt)
- [Khulna](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/khulna-bd40.txt)
- [Mymensingh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mymensingh-bd45.txt)
- [Rajshahi](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rajshahi-bd50.txt)
- [Rangpur](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/rangpur-bd55.txt)
- [Sylhet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sylhet-bd60.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (division), 2 (district), 3 (upazila)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Bangladesh Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/bangladesh-administrative-divisions
